zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Ridel於1097年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾維特林時，她的父親Geoffrey Ridel23歲，母親Geva d'Avranches20歲。她於1123年與Richard Basset在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1139年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ridel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Rydell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the placename element ryd ‘woodland clearing’ + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.
English: variant of   Riddell  ; see   Riddle  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Ridel was born in 1097, in Wittering, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey Ridel, was 23 and her mother, Geva d'Avranches, was 20. She married Richard Basset in 1123, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1139, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Ridel est née en 1097, à Wittering, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Ridel, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Geva d'Avranches, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Basset en 1123, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1139, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Ridelが1097年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウィッテリングで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Ridelは23歳，母Geva d'Avranchesは20歳であった。1123年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでRichard Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1139年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Ridel(이)가 1097년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 윗테링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey Ridel(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Geva d'Avranches(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1123년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Richard Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1139년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Ridel родилась в 1097 г. в местности виттиринг, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffrey Ridel было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Geva d'Avranches, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Basset в 1123 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1139 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.
